zh.lifeSummary: 當Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino於大約1250年出生在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里可梅安三 史華連奴時，他的父親Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino22歲，母親Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino16歲。他於大約1288年與Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年5月10日享年78歲，埋葬在西班牙馬德利德三 洛倫佐 德 艾爾 艾斯可利亞爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino于大约1250年出生在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里可梅安三 史華連奴时，他的父亲Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino22岁，母亲Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino16岁。他于大约1288年与Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年5月10日享年78岁，埋葬在西班牙馬德利德三 洛倫佐 德 艾爾 艾斯可利亞爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sanseverino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cono, Enrico, Rocco, Canio, Giuseppe, Vito.

Italian (mainly Naples): habitational name from San Severino Lucano in Potenza, San Severino Marche in Macerata, or Mercato San Severino in Salerno, all so named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Severinus (see   Severin  ).

variants.name: Severin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Christophe, Florien, Francois, Marcel, Monique, Olivier, Patrice.

German, Swedish, Italian (Veneto), Czech, Croatian, and Romanian; Ukrainian (standard transliteration Severyn); French (Séverin); Slovak (Severín): from a personal name, Latin Severinus, from the same root as Severus (see Severe ). This was borne by several early Christian saints, including bishops of Trier (2nd century), Cologne (4th century), and Bordeaux (5th century), and hermits of Paris (6th century) and Tivoli (8th century), as well as a 5th-century apostle of Austria.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): shortened form of Severinovsky, a habitational name for someone from Severinovka in Ukraine.

nameMeanings.name: Tommaso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Thomas
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino was born about 1250, in San Severino, Comiziano, Naples, Campania, Italy, his father, Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino, was 22 and his mother, Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino, was 16. He married Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario about 1288, in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 May 1327, at the age of 78, and was buried in San Lorenzo de El Escorial, Madrid, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino est né environ 1250, à San Severino, Comiziano, Napoli, Campania, Italie, son père, Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario environ 1288, à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1327, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à San Lorenzo d’El Escorial, Madrid, Espagne.

Er hat um 1288 in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. ja.lifeSummary: Barone Tommaso II Sanseverinoが約1250年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリコミズアノサン セバーイノで生まれた時，父Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverinoは22歳，母Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverinoは16歳であった。約1288年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリでSveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricarioと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年5月10日に78歳で死去し，スペインマドリドサン ロアンゾ ド エル エスコリアルにて埋葬された。

ko.San Severino, Italy: 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 코미지아노 산 세버리노
ko.Escorial Monastery, San Lorenzo de El Es: 스페인 매드리드 산 로렌초 데 엘 스코리앨
ko.lifeSummary: Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino(이)가 대략 1250년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 코미지아노 산 세버리노에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 5월 10일 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 매드리드 산 로렌초 데 엘 스코리앨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em San Severino, Comiziano, Napoli, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario aproximadamente 1288, em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1327, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em San Lorenzo de El Escorial, Madrid, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barone Tommaso II Sanseverino родился около 1250 г. в местности сан сивирино, комизяно, наполи, кампаня, Италия, его отцу по имени Conte di Mileto Ruggero Sanseverino было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Donna Teodora D'Aquino Contessa di Sanseverino, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario около 1288 г. в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 мая 1327 г. в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности сан лорензо де эл эскоряль, мадрид, Испания.

Se casó con Sveva d'Avezzano, Contessa di Tricarico Señora de Tricario aproximadamente 1288, en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1327, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en San Lorenzo de El Escorial, Madrid, España.
